text_raw: Not yet... your reckoning will be harsher for the wait.
text_clean: Not yet... your reckoning will be harsher for the wait.

text_raw: You show me your back? A coward's answer.
text_clean: You show me your back? A coward's answer.

text_raw: Who dares turn their back on righteousness?
text_clean: Who dares turn their back on righteousness?

text_raw: Sinner. Confess your crimes before me!
text_clean: Sinner. Confess your crimes before me!

text_raw: Blindness to righteousness is the greatest sin of all.
text_clean: Blindness to righteousness is the greatest sin of all.

text_raw: To ignore the truth of sin is a crime beyond measure!
text_clean: To ignore the truth of sin is a crime beyond measure!

text_raw: You will kneel before righteousness, by choice or by force.

text_raw: I shall deliver judgment without mercy!
text_clean: I shall deliver judgment without mercy!

text_raw: Speak now, sinner, and unburden yourself.

text_clean: You show me your back? A coward's answer.

text_raw: All who defy righteousness will face judgment.

text_raw: I can already see you, on your knees before the Tribunal's gaze.

text_raw: What arrogance makes you stand against righteousness itself?
